raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The demand for CPA services is outpacing the number of new CPAs entering the profession.",
    "Over 300,000 accounting professionals have exited the workforce since 2019, a reduction of 17 percent.",
    "It is estimated that 75 percent of CPAs were of retirement-age in 2020.",
    "In 2022, there was a 17-year low in terms of the number of students who took the CPA Exam.",
    "Research has shown that adoption of the 150-semester unit requirement by states did not improve the quality of CPAs.",
    "The extra education required by the 150-semester unit requirement contributed to a 26 percent decline of entry by minority CPAs."
  ]
}
```
